title: About Me
intro: Welcome! I'm a developer, designer, and perpetual learner.

sections.heading: My Philosophy
sections.body: I believe in building small, independent tools and curating personal digital spaces that feel alive, rather than letting algorithms dictate what we see.

sections.heading: Current Setup
sections.body: This entire site is built using React, Vite, and Tailwind CSS, statically deployed to Neocities. It uses a fully decoupled JSON architecture.
